title: sclerochloa kengiana
intro: Sclerochloa kengiana, also known as the Keng's downy-grass or downy grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome and roots, which are used in traditional Chinese medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Sclerochloa kengiana include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the rhizome and roots of Sclerochloa kengiana are often dried, crushed, or made into a decoction to create teas, infusions, or other medicinal products.
